33:66:6.m: they are saying (referring to the disbelievers in the Fire)

33:66:9.m: Allah (as the object of أَطَعْنَا - we obeyed)

َ: (as the object of أَطَعْنَا - we obeyed)

33:67:4.m: we obeyed (سَادَتَنَا وَكُبَرَآءَنَا - our leaders and our great ones)

33:67:5.m: our leaders/masters (acted on by أَطَعْنَا - we obeyed)

33:67:6.m: and our great ones (being acted upon by 'we obeyed')

33:67:7.m: so they made us lose our way

33:68:2.m: bring to them! (command to our Lord)

33:68:3.m: two double portions (of الْعَذَابِ - the punishment)

33:68:7.m: a curse (emphasizing the curse in وَٱلْعَنْهُمْ)

33:69:1.m: O you all! (addressing the believers - الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا)

33:69:2.m: those who (describing the believers who are being addressed)

نَ: (describing the believers who are being addressed)

33:69:3.m: they believed (referring to the believers being addressed)

33:69:6.m: like those who (connected to تَكُونُوا۟ - be not)

33:69:9.m: and so he cleared him from blame (referring to موسى)

33:70:3.m: they believed (those who are addressed in يٰٓأَيُّهَا)

33:70:6.m: and (all of you) say! (command to group)

33:71:3.m: your deeds (referring to the people being addressed in يُصْلِحْ لَكُمْ - He will correct for you)

33:71:4.m: and He forgives (in response to وَمَن يُطِعِ - whoever obeys)

33:71:5.m: for you all (object of يُصْلِحْ - he will rectify)

33:71:6.m: your sins (object of يَغْفِرْ - He will forgive)

33:71:9.m: Allah (as the object being obeyed in يُطِعِ)

َ: (as the object being obeyed in يُطِعِ)

33:71:13.m: a great victory/success (object of فَازَ - 'has achieved')

33:72:3.m: the trust (object of عَرَضْنَا - we offered)

33:72:4.m: upon/to (connecting the offer with the heavens)

33:72:6.m: and the earth (object of عَرَضْنَا/we offered)

33:72:13.m: and he carried it (referring to الْأَمَانَةَ - the trust)

33:72:16.m: he was (describing the human in الْإِنسٰنُ)

33:72:17.m: one who often acts unfairly (describing كَانَ)

33:73:3.m: the hypocrites (those being punished by يُعَذِّبَ)

33:73:4.m: and the female hypocrites (acted upon by يُعَذِّبَ)

33:73:7.m: and he returns back (subject of يُعَذِّبَ)

33:73:11.m: and the female believers (object of يُعَذِّبَ)

33:73:12.m: and he was (connects to غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًۢا - forgiving and merciful)

33:73:13.m: Allah (the one true God) (subject of يُعَذِّبَ - will punish)

33:73:14.m: constantly forgiving (describing Allah in this ayah)

33:73:15.m: extremely merciful (describing Allah in this ayah)
